# dynamodb-toolkit (v3)

> Zero-runtime-dependency, ESM-only micro-library for AWS DynamoDB built on the AWS JS SDK v3 (`@aws-sdk/client-dynamodb` + `@aws-sdk/lib-dynamodb`). Ships an `Adapter` class with declarative schema, expression builders, batch + transaction helpers, resumable mass operations, cascade primitives, optimistic concurrency, marshallers, a framework-agnostic REST core, a `node:http` handler, and table-provisioning helpers + CLI. Runtime targets Node 20+, latest Bun, latest Deno.

## Install

```sh
npm install dynamodb-toolkit @aws-sdk/client-dynamodb @aws-sdk/lib-dynamodb
```

## Quick start

```js
import {DynamoDBClient} from '@aws-sdk/client-dynamodb';
import {DynamoDBDocumentClient} from '@aws-sdk/lib-dynamodb';
import {Adapter} from 'dynamodb-toolkit';

const client = DynamoDBDocumentClient.from(new DynamoDBClient({region: 'us-east-1'}), {
  marshallOptions: {removeUndefinedValues: true}
});

const adapter = new Adapter({
  client,
  table: 'planets',
  keyFields: ['name']
});

await adapter.put({name: 'Alderaan', diameter: 12500}, {force: true});
const item = await adapter.getByKey({name: 'Alderaan'});
await adapter.patch({name: 'Alderaan'}, {diameter: 13000}, {delete: ['climate']});
await adapter.delete({name: 'Alderaan'});
```

## Sub-exports

- `dynamodb-toolkit` — `Adapter`, `Raw`, `raw()`, `stampCreatedAtISO`, `stampCreatedAtEpoch`, error classes (`ToolkitError`, `ConsistentReadOnGSIRejected`, `NoIndexForSortField`, `BadFilterField`, `BadFilterOp`, `KeyFieldChanged`, `CreatedAtFieldNotDeclared`, `CascadeNotDeclared`, `TableVerificationFailed`, `TransactionLimitExceededError`), bare helpers (`sleep`, `seq`, `random`), type re-exports.
- `dynamodb-toolkit/expressions` — `buildUpdate`, `addProjection`, `buildSearch`, `buildFilterByExample`, `buildCondition`, `buildKeyCondition`, `cleanParams`, `cloneParams`.
- `dynamodb-toolkit/batch` — `applyBatch`, `applyTransaction`, `explainTransactionCancellation`, `getBatch`, `getTransaction`, `backoff`, `TRANSACTION_LIMIT`.
- `dynamodb-toolkit/mass` — `paginateList`, `iterateList`, `iterateItems`, `readList`, `readListGetItems`, `readByKeys`, `writeItems`, `deleteList`, `deleteByKeys`, `copyList`, `moveList`, `getTotal`, `encodeCursor`, `decodeCursor`, `mergeMapFn`, `MassOpOptions`/`MassOpResult` types. Deprecated aliases: `readListByKeys`, `readOrderedListByKeys`, `deleteListByKeys`, `writeList`.
- `dynamodb-toolkit/marshalling` — `marshallDateISO` / `unmarshallDateISO` (+ `dateISO` pair), `marshallDateEpoch` / `unmarshallDateEpoch` (+ `dateEpoch` pair), `marshallMap` / `unmarshallMap`, `marshallURL` / `unmarshallURL` (+ `url` pair).
- `dynamodb-toolkit/hooks` — `stampCreatedAtISO(fieldName?)`, `stampCreatedAtEpoch(fieldName?)` prepare-hook builders (also re-exported from root).
- `dynamodb-toolkit/paths` — `getPath`, `setPath`, `deletePath`, `applyPatch`, `normalizeFields`, `subsetObject`.
- `dynamodb-toolkit/rest-core` — parsers (`parseFields`, `parseSort`, `parseFilter`, `parseSearch`, `parsePatch`, `parseNames`, `parsePaging`, `parseFlag`, `coerceStringQuery`), builders (`buildEnvelope`, `buildErrorBody`, `paginationLinks`, `buildListOptions`, `resolveSort`, `stripMount`, `validateWriteBody`), policy (`defaultPolicy`, `mapErrorStatus`, `mergePolicy`).
- `dynamodb-toolkit/handler` — `createHandler`, `matchRoute`, `readJsonBody`.
- `dynamodb-toolkit/provisioning` — `planTable`, `ensureTable`, `verifyTable`, `diffTable`, descriptor helpers (`buildDescriptorSnapshot`, `compareDescriptor`, `readDescriptor`, `writeDescriptor`), lower-level primitives (`buildCreateTableInput`, `buildAddGsiInput`, `planAddOnly`, `describeTable`, `executePlan`, `extractDeclaration`).
- `dynamodb-toolkit` CLI — `bin/dynamodb-toolkit.js` with `plan-table <module>` / `ensure-table <module>` / `verify-table <module>` subcommands. Shipped in the tarball.

## Adapter constructor options

| Field | Type | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `client` | `DynamoDBDocumentClient` | **Required.** Build with `DynamoDBDocumentClient.from(new DynamoDBClient(...))`. |
| `table` | `string` | **Required.** Base table name. |
| `keyFields` | `(string \| KeyFieldSpec)[]` | **Required.** Partition key first, optional sort key second. Bare strings → `{name, type: 'string'}`. `{type: 'number'}` requires `width` in a composite. Normalised to `Required<KeyFieldSpec>[]` on the instance. |
| `structuralKey` | `string \| {name, separator?}` | Required when `keyFields.length > 1`. Names the joined-composite field. Separator default `'\|'`. |
| `indices` | `Record<string, IndexSpec>` | Single map of GSIs/LSIs, discriminated by `type: 'gsi' \| 'lsi'`. Per entry: `pk` / `sk` (GSI pk required; LSI sk required and no pk), `projection` (`'all'` default, `'keys-only'`, or `string[]` INCLUDE list), `sparse` (`true` or `{onlyWhen}` predicate), `indirect` (two-hop read). |
| `typeLabels` | `string[]` | Labels paired 1:1 with `keyFields`. `typeOf(item)` returns `typeLabels[depth-1]` when set. |
| `typeDiscriminator` | `string \| {name}` | Explicit type field; its value on an item overrides depth-based `typeOf`. |
| `typeField` | `string` | When set, the built-in prepare step writes `typeOf(item)` at this field on every full write unless already set. Typically same as `typeDiscriminator`. Enables Pattern-1 sparse-GSI-by-type. |
| `technicalPrefix` | `string` | Opt-in adapter-managed-field marker (e.g. `'-'`). User items with this prefix are rejected; reads strip it; every declared technical field (structural key, version, createdAt, search mirrors, descriptor) must start with it. |
| `searchable` | `Record<string, 1 \| true>` | Fields that get a `searchablePrefix + field` lowercase mirror column. |
| `searchablePrefix` | `string` | Default `'-search-'`. |
| `filterable` | `Record<string, ops \| {ops, type?}>` | Allowlist for the `<op>-<field>=<value>` URL grammar. Ops: `eq ne lt le gt ge in btw beg ct ex nx`. Type defaults to the keyField / index-key / `'string'`. |
| `versionField` | `string` | Opt-in optimistic concurrency. Auto-init on `post`, auto-condition on `put`/`edit`, auto-`ADD +1` on `patch`/`edit`. Must start with `technicalPrefix`. |
| `createdAtField` | `string` | Enables `options.asOf` on mass ops (`<createdAtField> <= :asOf`). Not auto-written — use `stampCreatedAtISO`/`stampCreatedAtEpoch` in `prepare`. Must start with `technicalPrefix`. |
| `relationships` | `{structural?: boolean}` | Gates cascade primitives. `{structural: true}` treats composite `structuralKey` as the parent-child hierarchy. |
| `descriptorKey` | `string` | Opt-in reserved-record key (e.g. `'__adapter__'`) for the provisioning descriptor snapshot. List ops auto-filter this row; opt-out via `{includeDescriptor: true}`. |
| `projectionFieldMap` | `Record<string, string>` | Alias → real field for projections. |
| `indirectIndices` | `Record<string, 1 \| true>` | Legacy form — synthesised into `indices` as `{type: 'gsi', indirect: true, projection: 'keys-only'}`. |
| `hooks` | `AdapterHooks<TItem>` | Per-instance overrides; merges over defaults. Built-in prepare/revive steps compose with user hooks. |

### Hooks

- `prepare(item, isPatch?)` — pre-write transform. Built-in step adds structural key, searchable mirrors, sparse-index markers, `typeField`, version init. User override runs last. Patches skip structural-key recomputation.
- `prepareKey(key, index?)` — identity default; the Adapter restricts to `keyFields`/index key schema afterwards.
- `prepareListInput(example, index?)` — supplies `KeyConditionExpression` / `IndexName` for list ops.
- `updateInput(input, {name, force?})` — last-chance mutation of the built SDK Command input.
- `revive(rawItem, fields?)` — default `subsetObject(rawItem, fields)` then strips `technicalPrefix` fields; preserves `versionField` / `createdAtField` if declared.
- `validateItem(item, isPatch?)` — async throw-to-abort.
- `checkConsistency(batch)` — return extra `make*` descriptors to bundle into a `TransactWriteItems` (otherwise the single-Command fast path runs).

### Filter URL grammar (Option W)

Structured filter per query-param: `?<op>-<field>=<value>`. Multi-value ops use first-character delimiter: `?in-status=,active,pending` splits on the leading `,`. `?btw-year=-2020-2024` splits on `-`. Allowlist is `filterable`; unlisted fields / ops throw `BadFilterField` / `BadFilterOp`.

| op | Meaning | Arity |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `eq` | `=` | scalar |
| `ne` | `<>` | scalar |
| `lt` `le` `gt` `ge` | `<` `<=` `>` `>=` | scalar |
| `in` | `IN (...)` | array (first-char delimiter) |
| `btw` | `BETWEEN a AND b` | 2-array |
| `beg` | `begins_with` | scalar |
| `ct` | `contains` | scalar |
| `ex` `nx` | `attribute_exists` / `_not_exists` | none |

Clauses that match a table/index pk/sk auto-promote to `KeyConditionExpression`; the rest land in `FilterExpression`.

### Free-form search

`?search=value` (renamed from `?filter=` in 3.7.0) runs a substring filter over `searchablePrefix + field` mirror columns. Case-insensitive by default. Declare mirrored fields via `searchable`.

## Adapter methods

### Reads
- `getByKey(key, fields?, options?)` → `TItem | undefined`. `options`: `{consistent, reviveItems, ignoreIndirection, params}`.
- `getByKeys(keys, fields?, options?)` → `(TItem | undefined)[]` — length-preserving; `undefined` at missing positions.
- `getList(options?, example?, index?)` → `{data, offset, limit, total?}`.
- `getListByParams(params, options?)` → same envelope; skips `prepareListInput`.
- `getListUnder(partialKey, options?)` → sugar for `getListByParams(buildKey(partialKey), options)`.
- `buildKey(values, {self?, partial?, indexName?}?, params?)` → builds `KeyConditionExpression`. Contiguous-from-start `values` keyed by `keyFields` names. Defaults to children-only `begins_with`; `{self: true}` includes self + descendants (no trailing separator); `{partial: 'Bui'}` narrows the next tier.
- `typeOf(item)` → `string | number | undefined`. Priority: `typeDiscriminator` value → `typeLabels[depth-1]` → raw depth → undefined.
- `findIndexForSort(field)` → index name matching `sk.name === field`. Prefers LSI over GSI. Throws `NoIndexForSortField` when nothing matches.
- `applyFilter(params, clauses)` → mutates `params`. Compiles `FilterClause[]` into expression(s), auto-promoting index-compatible clauses.

### Writes — single
- `post(item, {returnFailedItem?}?)` — create-only (`attribute_not_exists`). 409 on collision.
- `put(item, {force?, conditions?, params?, returnFailedItem?}?)` — update-only unless `force`.
- `patch(key, patch, {delete?, separator?, arrayOps?, conditions?, expectedVersion?, params?, returnFailedItem?}?)` — partial update; key fields auto-stripped from patch.
- `edit(key, mapFn, {readFields?, conditions?, allowKeyChange?, params?, returnFailedItem?}?)` → revived new item or `undefined` — read → mapFn → shallow diff → UpdateItem. Throws `KeyFieldChanged` on key mutation unless `allowKeyChange`.
- `delete(key, {conditions?, expectedVersion?, params?, returnFailedItem?}?)` — idempotent without conditions.
- `clone(key, mapFn?, {force?, params?, reviveItems?, ignoreIndirection?}?)` → written item or `undefined`.
- `move(key, mapFn?, options?)` → written item or `undefined` — clone + delete in one `TransactWriteItems`.

### Writes — mass (resumable list-op variants return `MassOpResult`)
- `putItems(items, options?)` → `{processed}`.
- `deleteByKeys(keys, options?)` → `{processed}`.
- `deleteListByParams(params, options?)` → `MassOpResult` (resumable).
- `cloneByKeys(keys, mapFn, options?)` → `{processed}`.
- `cloneListByParams(params, mapFn, options?)` → `MassOpResult` (resumable).
- `moveByKeys(keys, mapFn, options?)` → `{processed}`.
- `moveListByParams(params, mapFn, options?)` → `MassOpResult` (resumable).
- `editListByParams(params, mapFn, options?)` → `MassOpResult` (resumable; unchanged items → `skipped`).
- `rename(fromExample, toExample, options?)` → `MassOpResult` — subtree rename (put-then-delete, constructive first).
- `cloneWithOverwrite(fromExample, toExample, options?)` → `MassOpResult` — delete-then-put at destination (destructive first).
- `swapPrefix(srcPrefix, dstPrefix)` → mapFn that rewrites the leading keyField prefix. Throws at apply time when an item doesn't match `srcPrefix` (signals a mis-scoped upstream query).
- `overlayFields(overlay)` → mapFn merging a static object into each item.

Deprecated mass-op aliases (still work via `warnOnce`, removed in a future minor): `putAll`, `deleteAllByParams`, `cloneAllByParams`, `moveAllByParams`, plus `getAll` / `getAllByParams` on reads.

### Cascade primitives (requires `relationships.structural`)
- `deleteAllUnder(srcKey, options?)` — leaf-first descendant delete + self delete.
- `cloneAllUnder(srcKey, dstKey, options?)` / `cloneAllUnderBy(srcKey, mapFn, options?)` — root-first. Prefix-swap vs mapFn-driven.
- `moveAllUnder(srcKey, dstKey, options?)` / `moveAllUnderBy(srcKey, mapFn, options?)` — leaf-first, two-phase idempotent.

Throws `CascadeNotDeclared` when called without the declaration.

### Batch builders
- `makeGet(key, fields?, params?)` → `{action: 'get', adapter, params}`
- `makeCheck(key, params?)` → `{action: 'check', params}`
- `makePost(item, {returnFailedItem?}?)` → `{action: 'put', params}` (with `attribute_not_exists`)
- `makePut(item, {force?, conditions?, expectedVersion?, params?, returnFailedItem?}?)` → `{action: 'put', params}`
- `makePatch(key, patch, options?)` → `{action: 'patch', params}`
- `makeDelete(key, {conditions?, expectedVersion?, params?, returnFailedItem?}?)` → `{action: 'delete', params}`

`returnFailedItem: true` sets `ReturnValuesOnConditionCheckFailure: 'ALL_OLD'` on the request; the thrown `ConditionalCheckFailedException.Item` carries the colliding item. Inside a transaction, pair with `explainTransactionCancellation` to map back to the failing descriptor.

## Mass-op envelope

```ts
interface MassOpOptions {
  ifNotExists?: boolean;         // per-item attribute_not_exists
  ifExists?: boolean;            // per-item attribute_exists
  maxItems?: number;             // soft cap (page-boundary enforced)
  resumeToken?: string;          // from a prior MassOpResult.cursor
  asOf?: Date | string | number; // scope-freeze; requires createdAtField
  strategy?: 'native' | 'sequential';
  params?: Record<string, unknown>;
  includeDescriptor?: boolean;   // show the descriptor row in list ops
}

interface MassOpResult {
  processed: number;
  skipped: number;
  failed: {key, reason, details?, sdkError?}[];
  conflicts: {key, reason: 'VersionConflict', sdkError?}[];  // populated when versionField declared
  cursor?: string;               // base64 JSON; decodeCursor() for debug
}
```

## Batch helpers (`dynamodb-toolkit/batch`)

- `applyBatch(client, ...descriptors)` → `Promise<number>` — chunked `BatchWriteItem` (25/call), `UnprocessedItems` retry.
- `applyTransaction(client, ...descriptors)` → `Promise<number>` — single `TransactWriteItems` (limit `TRANSACTION_LIMIT` = 100). Accepts `{options: {clientRequestToken?, returnConsumedCapacity?, returnItemCollectionMetrics?}}` sentinel at any position; later entries win on merge.
- `explainTransactionCancellation(err, ...descriptors)` → `{failures, message} \| null` — maps `CancellationReasons` back to input descriptors. `failures[i]` has `{index, descriptor, code, message?, item?}` (`item` populated when the descriptor set `returnFailedItem: true`). Returns `null` for non-cancellation errors.
- `getBatch(client, ...descriptors)` → `Promise<{table, item}[]>` — chunked `BatchGetItem` (100/call).
- `getTransaction(client, ...descriptors)` → `Promise<{table, item, adapter?}[]>` — single `TransactGetItems`.
- `backoff(from = 50, to = 20_000, finite?)` — generator of exponential-jittered delays. Defaults to AWS "stop around one minute" guidance (8 attempts).

## REST handler

```js
import {createServer} from 'node:http';
import {createHandler} from 'dynamodb-toolkit/handler';

const handler = createHandler(adapter, {
  sortableIndices: {name: 'by-name-index'},
  policy: {/* override defaults */},
  maxBodyBytes: 1024 * 1024
});
createServer(handler).listen(3000);
```

### Standard route pack

| Method | URL | Maps to |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `GET` | `/` | `getList` + envelope `{data, offset, limit, total?, links?}` |
| `GET` | `/:key` | `getByKey` (404 on miss) |
| `GET` | `/-by-names?names=A,B` | `getByKeys` (length-preserving array; `null` at misses) |
| `POST` | `/` | `post` (204; 409 on existing) |
| `PUT` | `/:key?force=true` | `put` (204; 409 without force on missing) |
| `PATCH` | `/:key` | `patch` (body: `{field, _delete, _separator, _arrayOps}`) |
| `DELETE` | `/:key` | `delete` (204, idempotent) |
| `DELETE` | `/?<op>-field=…&search=…` | `deleteListByParams` (`MassOpResult`) |
| `DELETE` | `/-by-names?names=…` | `deleteByKeys` (`{processed}`) |
| `PUT` | `/-load` | `putItems` (body: array of items; `{processed}`) |
| `PUT` | `/-clone` / `/-move` | `cloneListByParams` / `moveListByParams` (body: overlay; `MassOpResult`) |
| `PUT` | `/-clone-by-names?names=…` / `/-move-by-names?names=…` | `cloneByKeys` / `moveByKeys` |
| `PUT` | `/:key/-clone` / `/:key/-move` | single-item `clone` / `move` |

`HEAD /:key` auto-promotes to `GET /:key` (body stripped). Method prefix `-` is configurable via `policy.methodPrefix`.

### Query parameters

- `?fields=name,climate` — projection (`?fields=*keys` wildcard = keysOnlyFields).
- `?search=tatooine` — free-form substring over `searchable` mirrors.
- `?eq-field=value` / `?in-field=,a,b,c` / `?btw-year=-2020-2024` / `?ex-optional=` / `?nx-optional=` — structured filter grammar (Option W).
- `?sort=name` / `?sort=-name` — ascending / descending; resolved via `sortableIndices`.
- `?offset=N&limit=N` — pagination (clamped by `policy.maxOffset` / `policy.maxLimit`).
- `?consistent=yes|true|1|on` — strong consistency.
- `?force=yes|true|1|on` — overwrite on `put`/`clone`/`move`.

### DoS mitigations

- `createHandler`: `maxBodyBytes` (default 1 MB; bytes, not UTF-16) → 413.
- `parsePaging`: `maxOffset` default `100_000`, `maxLimit` `100`, `defaultLimit` `10` (all policy-controlled).
- Parsers: `parseFields` / `parseNames` default `maxItems: 1000`; `parseSearch` default `maxLength: 1024`.
- `parsePatch` / `coerceStringQuery` use null-prototype accumulators to defend against `__proto__` / `constructor` pollution.

### Error mapping

Per `policy.statusCodes`: `ConditionalCheckFailedException` / `TransactionCanceledException` / `TransactionConflictException` → 409, `ValidationException` → 422, `ProvisionedThroughputExceededException` / `RequestLimitExceeded` → 429, 5xx SDK → 503, else → 500. Toolkit errors carry their own `.status` for sensible defaults.

## Framework adapters

The bundled `dynamodb-toolkit/handler` is `node:http`-only. Framework bindings ship as separate zero-dep packages (frameworks are peer deps). All share the same wire contract as the bundled handler.

- [`dynamodb-toolkit-koa`](https://www.npmjs.com/package/dynamodb-toolkit-koa) — Koa 2 / 3 middleware.
- [`dynamodb-toolkit-express`](https://www.npmjs.com/package/dynamodb-toolkit-express) — Express 4 / 5 middleware.
- [`dynamodb-toolkit-fetch`](https://www.npmjs.com/package/dynamodb-toolkit-fetch) — `(Request) => Promise<Response>` for Cloudflare Workers, Deno Deploy, Bun.serve, Hono, Node's native fetch server.
- [`dynamodb-toolkit-lambda`](https://www.npmjs.com/package/dynamodb-toolkit-lambda) — AWS Lambda (API Gateway v1 / v2, Function URL, ALB) with auto-detection + local-debug bridges.

Each is at `0.3.0` with peer-dep `dynamodb-toolkit@^3.7.0`.

## Provisioning

```js
import {planTable, ensureTable, verifyTable} from 'dynamodb-toolkit/provisioning';

const plan = await planTable(adapter);          // read-only; returns {tableName, steps, summary}
const {plan, executed} = await ensureTable(adapter);   // plan + apply; ADD-only
const {ok, diffs} = await verifyTable(adapter, {throwOnMismatch: true});
```

`ensureTable` is additive only — creates the table, adds missing GSIs. LSIs can only be declared at CreateTable; missing LSIs emit `skip-missing-lsi`. Extras in live schema emit `skip-extra-*` (warn, not error). When `descriptorKey` is declared, a JSON snapshot of the adapter's declaration is written at the reserved row — captures things `DescribeTable` can't see (marshalling, searchable, filterable, versionField, etc.).

CLI:

```sh
npx dynamodb-toolkit plan-table   ./adapter.js [--json]
npx dynamodb-toolkit ensure-table ./adapter.js [--json]
npx dynamodb-toolkit verify-table ./adapter.js [--strict] [--require-descriptor] [--json]
```

## Marshalling

```js
import {dateISO, dateEpoch, url, marshallMap} from 'dynamodb-toolkit/marshalling';

hooks: {
  prepare(item) {
    return {
      ...item,
      createdAt: dateISO.marshall(item.createdAt),     // Date → ISO string
      homepage: url.marshall(item.homepage),           // URL → string
      counts: marshallMap(item.counts)                 // Map → plain object
    };
  },
  revive(raw) {
    return {
      ...raw,
      createdAt: dateISO.unmarshall(raw.createdAt),
      homepage: url.unmarshall(raw.homepage),
      counts: unmarshallMap(raw.counts)
    };
  }
}
```

`Marshaller<TRuntime, TStored>` pairs ship as `dateISO`, `dateEpoch`, `url`. `marshallMap(map, valueTransform?)` flattens a `Map` → object. `undefined` / `null` pass through everywhere.

## Hook-builder helpers

```js
import {stampCreatedAtISO} from 'dynamodb-toolkit';

new Adapter({
  client, table: 'events', keyFields: ['id'],
  technicalPrefix: '-',
  createdAtField: '-createdAt',
  hooks: {
    prepare: stampCreatedAtISO('-createdAt')   // writes ISO timestamp on first insert only
  }
});
```

`stampCreatedAtEpoch` writes `Date.now()` instead.

## Optimistic concurrency

```js
new Adapter({
  client, table, keyFields: ['id'],
  technicalPrefix: '-',
  versionField: '-version'
});

await adapter.post(item);                                    // writes version=1
const {v: version, ...snapshot} = await adapter.getByKey(k); // read, bring back version
await adapter.patch(k, {x: 'y'}, {expectedVersion: version}); // condition on version=N
```

`post` inits to `1`. `put` reads version from the caller's item, conditions on `attribute_not_exists(<pk>) OR <versionField> = :observed`, writes `observed + 1`. `patch` conditions when `expectedVersion` is supplied, always `ADD +1`. `edit` / `editListByParams` handle it automatically via read-then-write; mass-op results bucket into `conflicts: [{key, reason: 'VersionConflict'}]`.

## Scope-freeze (asOf)

```js
await adapter.deleteListByParams(params, {asOf: '2026-04-01T00:00:00Z'});
```

Requires `createdAtField` declared. AND-merges `<createdAtField> <= :asOf` into the `Query`/`Scan` FilterExpression. `Date` is auto-ISO-converted; string/number pass through.

## Patching

```js
await adapter.patch({name: 'Alderaan'}, {diameter: 13000}, {
  delete: ['climate', 'meta.tag'],
  arrayOps: [{op: 'append', path: 'moons', values: ['X']}]
});
```

`delete` lists paths to `REMOVE`. `separator` (default `'.'`) splits dotted paths; pure-digit segments become array indices. `arrayOps[i].op` ∈ `'append' | 'prepend' | 'setAtIndex' | 'removeAtIndex' | 'add'`. On the wire the same shape uses `_delete` / `_separator` / `_arrayOps` (configurable via `policy.metaPrefix`).

## Error classes

All extend `ToolkitError` (which extends `Error`). `err.name` matches the class name for non-`instanceof` discrimination.

| Class | Fields | Meaning |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `ConsistentReadOnGSIRejected` | `indexName` | `ConsistentRead: true` on a GSI Query (DynamoDB rejects; use an LSI). |
| `NoIndexForSortField` | `sortField` | `?sort=<field>` has no matching declared index. |
| `BadFilterField` | `field` | `<op>-<field>=...` names a field not in `filterable`. |
| `BadFilterOp` | `field`, `op` | Op not allowlisted for the field. |
| `KeyFieldChanged` | `fields` | `edit()` mapFn touched a keyField without `{allowKeyChange: true}`. |
| `CreatedAtFieldNotDeclared` | — | `asOf` used without `createdAtField` declared. |
| `CascadeNotDeclared` | `operation` | Cascade primitive called without `relationships.structural`. |
| `TableVerificationFailed` | `tableName`, `diffs` | `verifyTable({throwOnMismatch})` detected drift. |
| `TransactionLimitExceededError` | `count`, `limit` | Combined `TransactWriteItems` actions > 100. |

## Migration v2 → v3

- AWS SDK v3 peer-deps replace `aws-sdk` v2.
- Single `Raw<T>` replaces `Raw` / `DbRaw`.
- Options bags everywhere (`put(item, {force: true})`, `patch(key, patch, {delete: [...]})`).
- Hooks renamed: `prepareListParams` → `prepareListInput`, `updateParams` → `updateInput`.
- Patch wire format: `_delete` / `_separator` (single underscore; configurable via `policy.metaPrefix`).
- REST split into `rest-core` (framework-agnostic) + `handler` (`node:http`); Koa in separate package.
- Dropped: `makeClient`, `getProfileName`, `specialTypes`, `converter`, `converterOptions`. Use `@aws-sdk/credential-providers`.
- `generic*` mass methods folded into `options.strategy: 'native' | 'sequential'`.
- Transaction limit 25 → 100.

## Links

- Wiki: https://github.com/uhop/dynamodb-toolkit/wiki
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/dynamodb-toolkit
- Full LLM reference: https://github.com/uhop/dynamodb-toolkit/blob/master/llms-full.txt
